questions.question: Which task landed the deterministic structured corpus index over the whole corpus?
Which task built the query engine with mandatory provenance and EXPLAIN-able retrieval?
Which task added the MCP and HTTP API fronts, token scoped, for the memory API?
Which task is the VSA semantic layer two and the empirical eval gate?
Which task ports the engine core to an actual Mycelium language package?
Which task is the test layout retrofit extracting inline tests into in-crate modules?
Which task covers the self-hosted compiler myc files being ported to Mycelium?
Which task automates the scoped toolchain setup from the change-kind map?
Which task fixed the transpiler coverage metric to the honest checked fraction?
Which task found that macros are the dominant transpiler gap class?
Which task ported semcore increment one to Mycelium?
Which task judged the Rust to Mycelium transpiler a gap profiling instrument, not a bulk porter?
Which task builds the GPU VSA experiment for the OQ-F disposition on the desktop?
Which task landed the scaling curves and regression gate machinery for the bench harness?
Where is the design note for the transparent memory substrate and agent knowledge API?
Which epic converts the project corpus into the transparent memory substrate and knowledge API?
